dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back! Continue your cybersecurity training journey.
dashboard.loadError: Some data could not be loaded. Please refresh the page.

tips.title: Never Share Your OTP
tips.body: One-Time Passwords are confidential. No bank, government body, or colleague should ever ask for them.

tips.title: Verify Links Before Clicking
tips.body: Attackers use lookalike domains. Always inspect URLs carefully before clicking any link.

tips.title: Use Strong Unique Passwords
tips.body: Never reuse passwords across sites. Use a password manager to generate complex credentials.

tips.title: Avoid Public Wi-Fi for Work
tips.body: Public networks can be monitored. Use a VPN or mobile data when accessing work systems.

tips.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
tips.body: Even if your password leaks, attackers cannot log in without your second factor.

tips.title: Beware of Shoulder Surfing
tips.body: In public spaces, shield your screen. Sensitive data can be stolen just by looking over your shoulder.

tips.title: Report Suspicious Activity
tips.body: If you receive an unusual login alert or suspect a breach, notify your security team immediately.

tips.title: Lock Your Screen When Away
tips.body: Always lock your computer when stepping away, even for a few minutes. Win+L or Cmd+Ctrl+Q.

tips.title: Recognize Phishing Emails
tips.body: Suspicious urgency, unknown senders, and unusual requests are red flags. When in doubt, report to IT.
